final:
// // This module loads a 5-bit input value and outputs the previous value on the next clock edge
module PIPO_Shift_Register (
    input wire clk,
    input wire load, 
    input wire [4:0] data_in,
    output reg [4:0] data_out
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (load) begin
        data_out <= data_in;  // load data_in to data_out
    end
end

endmodule
